scripts.dev: node -e "const { spawn } = require('node:child_process'); const run = (command) => spawn(command, { shell: true, stdio: 'inherit' }); const frontend = run('npm run dev:frontend'); const backend = run('npm run dev:backend'); let shuttingDown = false; const shutdown = (code) => { if (shuttingDown) return; shuttingDown = true; frontend.kill('SIGTERM'); backend.kill('SIGTERM'); setTimeout(() => process.exit(code), 50); }; frontend.on('exit', (code) => shutdown(code ?? 0)); backend.on('exit', (code) => shutdown(code ?? 0)); process.on('SIGINT', () => shutdown(0)); process.on('SIGTERM', () => shutdown(0));"
